caveat: polling_rate_hz is a lower bound if it approaches sampler_loop_hz
_analysis_note: Connection: Xbox Series X/S controller, USB via USB2 dock. Captured in the in-app Claude Browser (Electron/Chromium 148) via the W3C Gamepad API, which is backed by Apple's GameController framework on macOS. Main display 144Hz (6.94ms), built-in ProMotion 120Hz (8.33ms); median interval 9.1ms exceeds both frame times, so the rate is NOT display-refresh-capped. sampler_loop_hz 337207 >> polling_rate_hz 109.9, so NOT loop-capped either. The max 423ms and high jitter_std are inflated by moments the stick paused (no new report -> long gap); median 9.1ms is the robust central value. ~110Hz effective is consistent with an Xbox controller's ~125Hz nominal report rate with some GameController delivery overhead.
